Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion out of all activity executions in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' out of all cases

Name: Number of times SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion is performed
Percentage of cases where SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion is followed by Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' out of all 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion that occurs before SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' out of all 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion appearing as the first activity in a case variant
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' out of all cases

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion relative to Manuscript Export Succeeded
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' out of all 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Number of variants in which SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion appears
Percentage of SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion occurrences that are part of variants ending in SW-EIC Reject
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' out of all 'SW-EIC Reject'

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion that is not immediately followed by any checklist-related reminder (e.g., SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' out of all cases where 'SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days' does not happen

Name: Ratio of SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion to SW-Checklist Completed across all cases
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' out of all 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Percentage of cases starting with SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion that eventually reach SW-Awaiting EIC Decision
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' out of all 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Frequency of SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion in variants that include at least one reviewer invitation reminder
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' out of all 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion events that occur before any plagiarism check activity (Plagiarism Originality Report Completed or Plagiarism Percent Match Threshold Exceeded)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' out of all 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed'

Name: Number of SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion instances that are followed within 24 hours by Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: Number of 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' activities for cases where activity 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation' occurs

Name: Percentage of SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion in relation to all initial-phase activities (including Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation and Manuscript Export Succeeded)
Metric: Percentage of 'SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion' out of all 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'
